title: Eva runtime configuration
$comment: Schema for the project-level Eva runtime configuration. / 项目级 Eva 运行时配置的 schema。

runtime.$comment: Runtime paths, environment, and hot-reload settings. / 运行时路径、环境和热更新设置。

env.$comment: Current environment name. / 当前环境名称。

workspace.$comment: Workspace root used to resolve relative paths. / 用于解析相对路径的工作区根目录。

data_dir.$comment: Runtime data directory for state, logs, and indexes. / 状态、日志和索引的运行时数据目录。

script_dir.$comment: Lua Agent script root. / Lua Agent 脚本根目录。

adapter_dir.$comment: Adapter manifest root. / Adapter manifest 根目录。

hot_reload.$comment: Whether reloadable runtime configuration is allowed. / 是否允许可热更新的运行时配置。

service_manager.$comment: Optional V1.14.5 service-manager abstraction config. Platform adapters require explicit kind and service name. / 可选 V1.14.5 服务管理器抽象配置。平台 adapter 必须显式指定 kind 和服务名。

eventbus.$comment: EventBus publication, recovery, and dead-letter settings. / EventBus 发布、恢复和死信设置。

scheduler.$comment: Default topic scheduling and delivery behavior. / Topic 调度与投递默认行为。

observability.$comment: Logging, tracing, metrics, audit, and OpenTelemetry exporter settings. / 日志、追踪、指标、审计和 OpenTelemetry exporter 设置。

config.$comment: Pointers to split configuration roots. / 拆分配置根目录的位置。
